summary: Full testing of 3 new features: Impact Calculator, Custom Scenario Builder, and Portfolio Upload/Editor. All 15 backend API tests passed. All 12 frontend features verified working via Playwright automation.
seed_data_creation: Used existing portfolios (Sample 16 assets, Uploaded 4 assets, UI Test 0 assets) and 99+ hub scenarios.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features fully tested and working: 1) Impact Calculator at /impact - calculates PD/LGD/EL/VaR across horizons with charts and multipliers. 2) Custom Scenario Builder creates blended scenarios with trajectory overrides. 3) Portfolio Manager at /portfolio-manager with Upload (CSV parsing), Editor (add/remove/save assets), and Portfolios list tabs.
passed_tests: === Backend API Tests (15/15 passed) ===
TestImpactCalculator::test_impact_returns_horizons_with_expected_loss - POST /api/v1/analysis/impact returns horizons array with expected_loss, var_95, avg_pd_change_pct
TestImpactCalculator::test_impact_returns_multipliers - Returns multipliers (carbon_price_2030, carbon_price_2050, emissions_change_pct, temperature_2050)
TestImpactCalculator::test_impact_returns_404_for_invalid_portfolio - Returns 404 for non-existent portfolio
TestImpactCalculator::test_impact_returns_400_for_empty_portfolio - Returns 400 for portfolio with 0 assets
TestImpactCalculator::test_impact_with_default_horizons - Uses default [2030, 2040, 2050] horizons
TestImpactCalculator::test_impact_sector_breakdown - Returns sector_breakdown in results
TestCustomScenarioBuilder::test_create_custom_scenario_with_overrides - POST /api/v1/analysis/custom-scenarios creates blended scenario with overrides
TestCustomScenarioBuilder::test_create_custom_scenario_minimal - Creates scenario without overrides (copy base)
TestCustomScenarioBuilder::test_custom_scenario_404_for_invalid_base - Returns 404 for invalid base_scenario_id
TestPortfolioUpload::test_parse_csv_returns_assets_and_mapping - POST /api/v1/analysis/portfolio-upload/parse returns assets and column_mapping
TestPortfolioUpload::test_parse_csv_auto_maps_columns - Auto-detects column mapping from CSV headers
TestPortfolioUpload::test_parse_csv_reports_errors - Reports errors for invalid rows
TestPortfolioUpload::test_create_portfolio_from_parsed_assets - POST /api/v1/analysis/portfolio-upload/create creates portfolio
TestCleanup::test_cleanup_test_scenarios - Cleanup custom scenarios
TestCleanup::test_cleanup_test_portfolios - Cleanup TEST_ portfolios
=== Frontend UI Tests (12/12 features verified) ===
/impact page loads with Portfolio and Scenario selectors
Portfolio selector shows portfolios with asset counts (Sample 16, Uploaded 4, UI Test 0)
Scenario selector shows hub scenarios (WITCH 1.5C, IRENA 1.5C, etc.)
Calculate button disabled until both portfolio and scenario selected
Calculate button click triggers impact calculation
Impact Results shows Expected Loss cards for 2030, 2040, 2050 ($814K, $1.04M, $1.29M)
Impact Results shows VaR 95% card ($3.19M) with PD change percentage
Bar chart 'Expected Loss by Horizon' displays correctly
Line chart 'PD Change by Horizon' displays correctly
Scenario Multipliers section visible
/portfolio-manager Upload tab shows drag-drop zone and CSV file input
/portfolio-manager Portfolios tab lists 3 portfolios with Edit buttons
/portfolio-manager Editor tab shows portfolio selector, Add Asset, Save buttons, and editable assets table
Navigation sidebar shows Impact Calculator and Portfolio Manager links
